name: Arista Networks
confidenceReason: AI Ethernet networking monopoly. Zero debt, $10.7B cash. InfiniBand-to-Ethernet shift is multi-year tailwind. ROIC ~192% is asset-light perfection.
bullCase: 25% revenue growth is the new baseline through 2026. The 1.6T Ethernet transition is just beginning. Asset-light model means nearly all growth drops to the bottom line. Addressable market expanding to $105B in AI networking.
bearCase: Forward P/E of 43x leaves little room for misses. Dependent on hyperscaler CapEx cycles. NVIDIA could fight back to keep InfiniBand dominant.
